name: Vegetable Fish Filets
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the filets in a layer in an oiled 9-inch square baking pan.
2. Saute onion, zucchini, and green pepper in oil until crisp-tender; spoon over the filets.
3. Top with tomatoes.
4. Combine sherry, lemon juice, salt, basil, pepper, and hot pepper sauce; pour over the filets.
5. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 25-30 minutes.
6. Remove fish and vegetables to a heated platter; sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. If desired, serve pan juices over bulgar or rice.
